scripts.check: npm run build:check && npm run test:js-runtime
scripts.wp-env:setup:multisite: node tools/wp-env-multisite.js run cli wp eval-file wp-content/plugins/AdminConfig/tests/fixtures/wp-env/bin/setup.php
scripts.test:e2e:rest-contract:multisite:run: cross-env LERM_ADMIN_CONFIG_REST_CONTRACT=1 LERM_ADMIN_CONFIG_MULTISITE=1 LERM_ADMIN_CONFIG_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8890 playwright test tests/E2E/network-mode.spec.js
scripts.test:integration: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:wait && npm run wp-env:setup && npm run test:integration:run
scripts.test:integration:multisite: npm run wp-env:start:multisite && npm run wp-env:wait:multisite && npm run wp-env:setup:multisite && npm run test:integration:multisite:run
scripts.test:e2e:block-editor: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:wait && npm run wp-env:setup && npm run wp-env:block-editor:on && npm run test:e2e:block-editor:run && npm run wp-env:block-editor:off
scripts.test:e2e: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:wait && npm run wp-env:setup && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:e2e:multisite: npm run wp-env:start:multisite && npm run wp-env:wait:multisite && npm run wp-env:setup:multisite && npm run test:e2e:multisite:run
scripts.test:e2e:rest-contract: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:wait && npm run wp-env:setup && npm run test:e2e:rest-contract:run
scripts.test:e2e:rest-contract:multisite: npm run wp-env:start:multisite && npm run wp-env:wait:multisite && npm run wp-env:setup:multisite && npm run test:e2e:rest-contract:multisite:run
scripts.test:wp: npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:wp:multisite: npm run test:integration:multisite && npm run test:e2e:multisite
scripts.test:wp:rest-contract: npm run test:e2e:rest-contract && npm run test:e2e:rest-contract:multisite
